name: Candy Plush Dog Toy - Boots & Barkley™ Purple
description:
Give your pup a special gift with this Candy Plush Dog Toy from Boots & Barkley™. This whimsical toy is designed like a round candy in purple with a white wavy pattern on the body, and it also sports shimmery ends for an eye-catching look. Featuring a cheerful smiley face with black eyes, a mouth and orange hearts as cheeks, it's sure to delight your furry friend. Made from soft polyester material, it's great for keeping them occupied cuddling or fetching.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.
